definition: Spot on!; Exactly!; You hit the nail on the head!
note: -ถูกต้อง(เลย) (tùuk dtɔ̂ng; tùuk dtɔ̂ng ləəi) — has a similar meaning but is a bit less emphatic.

definition: Exactly.; That’s it/right.; There you are then.; That’s… (or emphasizes preceding part of sentence).
Quite right!; Yes…; Exactly!; That’s just it!
(I) gotta get going; I’m gonna go now.; I gotta run.

thai: อย่าพูดเล่น

definition: Wow!; Oh!; Gee!; Holy Cow!; Whoa! (shows surprise in a kind of cute, comical way)
